entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop species Arachis hypogaea L. being studied for drought tolerance

entities.name: MID-SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: A period of water deficit occurring during the middle of the growing season

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The capacity of a genotype to produce a high yield

entities.name: TOLERANCE TO MID-SEASON MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to maintain productivity under mid-season water deficit

entities.name: RIL POPULATION
entities.description: A population of recombinant inbred lines used for genetic screening

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: General environmental condition of water deficiency

entities.name: RABI
entities.description: The winter cropping season in which the study was conducted

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water held in the soil

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The environmental temperature measured during the stress period

entities.name: SPAD CHLOROPHYLL METER READING
entities.description: A measure of leaf chlorophyll content

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA
entities.description: The ratio of leaf area to leaf dry mass

entities.name: RELATIVE WATER CONTENT
entities.description: The ratio of actual water content to full turgidity of a leaf

entities.name: VISUAL WILTING RATE
entities.description: The observable rate at which plants exhibit wilting symptoms

entities.name: CANOPY TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The temperature of the plant canopy surface

entities.name: POD YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The total weight of pods produced per individual plant

entities.name: KERNEL YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The total weight of kernels produced per individual plant

entities.name: SHELLING PERCENT
entities.description: The percentage of kernel weight relative to total pod weight

entities.name: GENOTYPE BY TRAIT BIPLOT
entities.description: A statistical visualization method used to analyze associations between genotypes and traits

entities.name: GENOMIC REGIONS
entities.description: Specific segments of the genome associated with particular traits

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Functional units of heredity that control traits like drought tolerance
